title: LAWOHO Christmas Tree Topper Tinsel Star, Exquisite Christmas Decor, 10 Inch Shiny Iridescent Christmas Tree Decoration with 6H Timer, 20 Warm LED Lights for Xmas Tree, Holiday & Party, Indoor Decor
features: Unique Design: This Christmas tree topper features shimmering tinsel foil that reflects light, creating a brilliant and dazzling sparkling effect. Featuring 20 energy-efficient LED lights, it delivers a soft yet elegant radiance to your Christmas tree. Perfectly sized for most standard trees, this exquisite Christmas tree decor adds a unique and enchanting atmosphere to your home

Battery Powered & Timer: Powered by a battery box with an easy on/off switch, our Christmas tree star topper requires no outlet—enjoy total cordless freedom and place your tree anywhere. This lighted star topper runs on 3 AA batteries (not included), emitting a warm glow that creates a cozy Christmas atmosphere. Equipped with a built-in 6-hour timer, it automatically turns off to save energy and give you peace of mind

High-Quality: Designed to last, our Christmas tree star is crafted from durable, dust-proof materials that resists aging and wear. Built to withstand years of use in any setting, this Xmas tree top star will brighten your holidays season after season. Make your festive decor more sustainable with this reliable Christmas tree decoration that stays beautiful celebration after celebration

Easy Installation: Designed with a built-in metal stand at the base, this glittered star Christmas treetop allows you to easily attach it to most Christmas trees—no extra tools needed. Perfect for hassle-free decorating, this Christmas tree topper star saves time and effort, making it ideal even for beginners. A quick-setup solution among Christmas tree toppers that brings sparkle to your tree in seconds

Sets the Perfect Mood: This Christmas star isn’t just for your tree — it’s perfect for decorating mantels, Christmas party setups, weddings, or as a festive centerpiece during the Christmas festival. Create a warm, cozy, and magical holiday atmosphere with this versatile star tree topper that transforms your home into a festive wonderland. Its soft glow is ideal for family nights and creating lasting memories, making it a wonderful gift for your loved ones
